action.reasoning: Observation: Best bal_acc still 0.5657 (iter2); recent models reach val_bal~0.79 but test only 0.50 with unstable rare classes (bird/squirrel ~0.09). Curves confirm source overfitting, DG gap. Time critically low (~12min left after 11min iter). Analysis: Mild augs/RandAugment/dropout/wd combo in recent iters hurt generalization vs simpler early CLIP setup; checkpoint overwritten so cannot reuse iter2. Focal/mixup earlier also unstable. Decision: Retrain short (5 epochs to fit ~5min), revert toward iter2 config - basic augs only (no RandAugment/blur/gray), weighted CE loss (no sampler), lower drops/wd, lr=2e-5+cosine, val_bal best ckpt, keep TTA in predict. This should recover/improve best within time; submit_eval immediately after.
